default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review LLM presence and explore a strategic refresh of Outreach's core website pages.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Outreach will use GrowthX's Scrunch data to build a link-building strategy, targeting competitor-cited blogs for inclusion.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Website Refresh:** GrowthX will support Outreach's manual website refresh by providing strategic SEO/LLM guidance and using its Atlas workflow tool to scale the effort.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [**Webinar Plan:** The planned LLM webinar will be a casual "lunch and learn" led by Jenn and Megan, timed for after GrowthX's new internal analytics tool launches.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**Performance Driver:** Content refreshes are driving strong October performance, with one article seeing an 800% traffic increase post-update.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

## Topics

### LLM Presence: Analysis & Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Outreach's LLM presence is inconsistent, fluctuating daily (e.g., present on Sep 27, absent on Oct 3).](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [**Cause:** LLM citation logic is opaque and favors recency, unlike traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Insight:** Scrunch data reveals third-party blogs citing competitors (Gong, Chorus) but not Outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Action:** Outreach will build a link-building strategy to get included in these competitor-cited blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Process:** Identify target blogs → Check for existing partnerships (with Haley) → Craft messaging (with Jeremy/PMMs).](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Website Refresh: Collaboration

  - [**Context:** Outreach's manual website refresh (led by Paul) provides an opportunity for strategic collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [**Goal:** Optimize core platform pages for both Google SEO and LLM retrievability.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [**GrowthX Support:** GrowthX will provide strategic guidance on page structure, metadata, and content optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [**Execution:** GrowthX's Atlas workflow tool can scale the refresh, similar to a project where they updated hundreds of landing pages for another client.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** The Q2 vs. Q3 LLM visibility report will identify pages with the biggest drops, guiding where to focus refresh efforts first.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

### LLM Webinar: Logistics

  - [**Decision:** The planned LLM webinar will be a casual "lunch and learn" to answer general team questions.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [**Timing:** The session will occur after GrowthX's new internal analytics tool launches (\~1 month).](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This timing allows for a demo of the new tool, which will replace Scrunch and become the primary reporting platform.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)

### October Performance: Content Refreshes

  - [**Trend:** October performance is strong, suggesting quality improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [**Key Driver:** Content refreshes are proving highly effective.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [**Example:** One article saw an 800% traffic increase after being refreshed on Oct 21.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hadassah:** Discuss the GrowthX website refresh proposal with the Outreach team (Paul, Deanna).](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [**Hadassah:** Confirm with Megan if a shared LLM webinar with other GrowthX clients is acceptable.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**Jenn/Megan:** Schedule the casual LLM "lunch and learn" after the new analytics tool launches.](https://fathom.video/share/VV_LjyzWY65u9a6xiDXWJVz6And7hdm9?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
